raw_consumer_statement:
Citi after requesting and receiving information about this issue has decided that they feel the complaint is too old to investigate further. While it is true that the original airline ticket charge occurred in XXXX, the flight was scheduled in XXXX and we promptly filed the complaint after the airline did not provide the paid for service to have this properly investigated. 

Below are the original details regarding the issue with the airline that we asked XXXX to intervene on our behalf to adjudicate : Due to severe understaffing at the XXXX XXXX check-in counter in XXXX a number of passengers, including myself and my daughter, were severely delayed from checking-in despite arriving XXXX hours before departure and missed the below flight from XXXX to XXXX : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX INT XXXX 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX - XXXX ( XXXX ) SPO = Classic Economy Class Further, the booking information provided by Condor was incompatible with the XXXX XXXX self-check-in system ( kiosks ) at the airport. We had also tried to check-in online in advance and were precvented by the XXXX website from doing this. 

As a result of the inability to board our scheduled flight, we incurred additional costs from flight change fees of approximately {$500.00} US plus other costs including ground transportation and an extra night of lodging. 

Thank you.
